Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs get bonuses from using FINE versions of them! Check the interface for what they give!

Herbert's cape

Herbert's cape
Rarity:
Type: Loot
Slot: Cape
Value: 2
Search
Keyword: 		Global
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

It's a bit dusty, which shows Herbert hasn't used it in ages. Perhaps you could give it a second life.

The Herbert's cape item is a loot item.

Requirements

This item has no requirements to use it.

Attribute

Global +1% Work efficiency

Uses

This item may be equipped to your character.

Sources

Shop Purchases

Shop Name Location Region Item Type Stock Price
Helpful Herbert's Hut Disenchanted Forest Jarvonia 1 14

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.

Trivia

  • This item is part of Herbert's Set.
